posts.author: MCazares (Maria Cazares)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Monday Community,

I have been having issues with the itty bitty space that we have to make formulas. There are some complex formulas that I need to do, but with the small space available it’s difficult to read correctly the formula, so i have been doing my formula in Monday.com, pasting it in Word to see it completely and then move it back to Monday.com.

Is there a way to in some cases increase the size of the space?
